codeReview.summary: Implementation in src/lib/dashboard/summaries.ts matches the feature requirements: polarity-aware direction, z-score status classification with boundary handling, zero-stddev safeguards, zero/negative-average-safe delta_pct, and omission of metrics without baselines. Test coverage in src/lib/dashboard/__tests__/summaries.test.ts exercises required polarity classes, thresholds, and edge cases.

sharedStateObservations.observation: There is a spec inconsistency on z-score boundary inclusivity at |z| = 1.28 between LLD and validation contract, which caused avoidable implementation/test interpretation work.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: validation-contract.md:61 defines warning as 0.67 < |z| ≤ 1.28, while docs/dashboard-backend-lld.md:1023-1025 uses strict inequalities (-1.28 < z < -0.67 or 0.67 < z < 1.28). Transcript skeleton for worker session d3f96956-4659-4a21-8107-2cac0eb6b04e shows explicit boundary ambiguity debugging.

summary: Reviewed feature summary-metrics-service (commit 4bb4ea2). Code and tests satisfy described behavior with no high-confidence actionable code defects found; review status is pass. Logged one shared-state observation about boundary-spec inconsistency between LLD and validation contract.
